name: MSI MEG Z890 UNIFY-X ATX Motherboard - Supports DDR5-9600+(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 6x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 4 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - USB 10Gbps (Type-C) - Intel Killer E5000B 5Gb LAN - Intel 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Tuning Controller Included (Z890UNIFYX)

description: High-end ATX motherboard for Intel LGA1851 with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7 for enthusiast builders.
